name.description: Human-readable plugin name. Example: WordPress Search Plugin
name.x-prompt: What name would you like to use?

wpEnvPort.description: Optional override for wp-env dev port. When omitted, the next available port is chosen from existing .wp-env.json files in the monorepo.

description.description: (Optional) Block Plugin description. Example: This plugin provides a search block for WordPress.
description.x-prompt: What description would you like to use?
